title: AutoSwap
description: Best-tool switching, broken armor/tools replacement, totem offhand rescue, and torch/block refills — keybind-ready.
body:
![Configuration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a2838d420c2b0fe26ddf6f7c3c5df8f03c73868.png)

[![JOIN OUR DISCORD](https://img.shields.io/badge/JOIN%20OUR%20DISCORD-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/4XUPywnEyE)

A client-side mod that automates inventory management and equipment swapping during
gameplay. It detects durability loss, empty item stacks, and block-breaking actions to
equip the correct items from your inventory automatically.

**Client-side only** (no server installation required). **Fully compatible with singleplayer**.

**Features**:
- **Smart Tool Selection**: Switches to the most efficient tool the moment you start
  mining a block, and won't replace a tool that's already the right type.
- **Auto Weapon on Attack**: Optionally draws your best sword from your
  inventory the instant you start hitting a mob — the combat counterpart of tool
  selection. Leave it off and AutoSwap simply never swaps off your weapon while a mob
  is in your crosshair.
- **Gear Replacement**: Automatically equips a matching tool, weapon, or armor piece
  from your inventory when the currently equipped one breaks.
- **Offhand Replenishment**: Keeps your off-hand stocked — when the held item is used
  up, AutoSwap refills it from a list you control. Add a Totem of Undying, shield, or
  any item through the built-in creative-style **item picker** (or by item id).
- **Stack Refills**: Automatically refills the active hotbar slot with identical blocks
  or torches when the current stack is depleted.
- **Double-Jump Elytra**: Equips an elytra from your inventory instantly upon performing
  a double jump, and swaps your chestplate back when you land.
- **Restore After Auto-Tool**: Puts the item you were holding back in
  your hand once you stop mining.

All features are completely modular. **Each function can be enabled or disabled**
individually through the redesigned in-game settings screen, the configuration file, or
via dedicated keybinds bindable under Controls → AutoSwap.

**Translated into 10 languages** — English and Russian are complete; other locales are
in progress.

**Please report any bugs, errors, or feature suggestions on Discord:** https://discord.gg/4XUPywnEyE
